no: BP-BGT Worldmap by Yacomo et al. Enhanced world map with improved travel routes and area markers. INSTALL LAST — after ALL area-adding mods (NWN, IWD, DSotSC, ntotsc, etc.). Replaces the game worldmap with its own, auto-detecting installed mods. Can go before or after EET_End.

conflicts.reason: BP-BGT-Worldmap must be installed AFTER NWNForBG. Worldmap mod auto-detects NWN and adds its locations.

a: Yacomo, King Diamond, Erebusant, Weigo, Roberciiik
sum: Adds an enhanced world map with clearer travel routes, distance indicators, and improved area markers across all campaigns.

co.tp2n: Worldmap for Baldur's Gate - including colored Baldur's Gate map icons
Use new Worldmap for Throne of Bhaal as well
co.no: ToB map using new worldmap. NOT EET-compatible (REQUIRE !GAME_IS eet). Will be skipped on EET
